emails.subject: Out on Tues
emails.body: Out on Tues I am not sure if I said or not that I would be out Tues. Jess has a series of doctor appointments (due to family history) tomorrow so I will be babysitting. Don't think I will be missing anything with it being so slow. John

emails.subject: RE: Out on Tues
emails.body: RE: Out on Tues Thanks for the reminder. Just an FYI it is not babysitting when it is your own kids. (Just kidding wanting to share a pet peeve of my sister's.) Stacey To: White, Stacey W.

emails.subject: RE: Out on Tues
emails.body: I have no rebuttle for that To: Postlethwaite, John
